positioning: For bookshelf lovers and creative adults — Nookcraft is the miniature house kit brand that turns the space between your books into a world worth exploring.
targetAudience: Adults 25–45, primarily women, who love crafting, bookshelf aesthetics, and Cottagecore
Gift buyers (any gender) looking for meaningful, hands-on gifts for birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day
Book Nook enthusiasts building out their shelves
Stress-relief seekers wanting screen-free focused activity
brandRole: Independent miniature house kit store with English-first instructions and honest difficulty guidance
conversionGoal: Guide readers to find the right kit for their skill level and order directly from the site
productDescription: Laser-cut basswood miniature house kits with full-color English photo instructions, LED lighting, and all components included
mustSay: Honest difficulty level: Intermediate (~4–7 hrs) or Advanced (~8–15 hrs), best split across two sessions
LED string included in every kit
30-day returns + free replacement parts for missing or damaged pieces

writingStyle.tone: Deliberate, warm without sweetness, honest, immersive
writingStyle.sentenceStyle: Specific over vague. Lead with sensory detail and numbers. Process before result.
avoidStyle: Opening with 'Have you ever' or 'Are you looking for'
Generic AI transitions (Furthermore, In conclusion, It's worth noting)

publishedBlogs.title: Why Miniature House Kits Are Relaxing
Can Parts Be Mixed and Matched
